# F035 Inner-Validation Operator Gate

## Decision
`F035_INNER_VAL_GATE_STILL_HELDOUT_BELOW_FLOOR`

## Purpose
F034 showed that the floor-initialized residual has signal but train-fit selection is too optimistic. F035 selects residual scale on train-only inner validation rows, then trains the full operator-initialized head on all train rows and applies the selected scale to held-out scoring.

## Mean Metrics
- selected residual scale mean: `0.620000`
- selected nonzero fraction: `1.000000`
- heldout local floor preserved: `False`
- selected transition: `0.340385`
- local floor transition: `0.333054`
- selected delta cosine: `0.936656`
- local floor delta cosine: `0.912222`
- selected recall@1: `0.851852`
- local floor recall@1: `0.859259`
- selected floor gap transition: `0.007331` (min `0.001891`)
- selected floor gap delta cosine: `0.024433` (min `0.003504`)
- selected floor gap recall: `-0.007407` (min `-0.111111`)
- inner-val selected gap transition: `0.008046`
- inner-val selected gap delta: `0.020840`
- inner-val selected gap recall: `0.027273`

## Promotion Status
No model is promoted. This branch tests whether train-only inner validation can safely choose residual scale without held-out peeking.
